name: Portuguese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour olive oil into a large stock or stew pot and sauté onions and garlic until soft and transparent.
2. Add sausage chunks and brown slightly.
3. Add beef stock and all other ingredients.
4. Bring to a boil, stirring often to prevent the bottom of the pan from burning.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 35-45 minutes or longer, stirring occasionally.
6. Correct seasonings to taste.
The recipe states that it yields one gallon, but it's really much more. The hardest part of this recipe is the chopping. You should cut up everything ahead of time (potatoes, sausage, cabbage, onions, garlic), so you can just dump it all into the pot when you're ready.
